channel.title: PeperNoten
channel.generator: Webpage HTML Export plugin for Obsidian

item.title: Vision-Speech Models: Teaching Speech Models to Converse about Images
item.description: MoshiVis adapts a speech LLM (Moshi) to understand images using lightweight cross-attention modules trained on mixed image-text and image-speech data. 🎙️ Demonstrates text-to-audio knowledge transfer despite distribution shift, enabling real-time visual conversations without speech-paired training data.
item.guid: Research/Vision-Speech Models Teaching Speech Models to Converse about Images.md
